component.name: PULS DiskInfo
component.summary: Disk health and S.M.A.R.T. monitoring for Linux

description.p: PULS DiskInfo is a professional-grade disk health monitoring application for Linux, inspired by CrystalDiskInfo. It reads S.M.A.R.T. data from your drives and presents it in a clear, detailed interface.

ul.li: Health status monitoring (Good/Caution/Bad) with color-coded indicators
Real-time temperature monitoring with visual gauges
Complete S.M.A.R.T. attributes table with threshold warnings
Support for HDD, SATA SSD, NVMe SSD, USB, and SSHD drives
Automatic drive detection and USB hotplug support
Drive identity details (model, serial, firmware, interface, capacity)
Power-on hours, cycle count, and total data written/read statistics
Periodic auto-refresh of disk health data
